expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: The scenario draft explicitly covers all three focus areas: (1) dashboard-level path distinction: "Export dashboard to Google Sheets distinguishes dashboard-level path from other export entry points" with steps comparing "dashboard-level Export entry point" vs "non-dashboard export entry point"; (2) option combinations: "Export dashboard to Google Sheets with each option combination (matrix coverage)" and "generate a minimal pairwise matrix of combinations"; (3) visible completion outcomes: repeated assertions like "A visible 'export started / in progress' indication appears" and "Export completes with a visible 'completed / success' outcome", plus a dedicated section "Export — Dashboard → Google Sheets (completion outcomes)".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly labeled "# Phase 4a — Scenario Draft (subcategories only)" and is structured as scenario drafts under subcategory headings (e.g., "Export — Dashboard → Google Sheets") with stepwise flows and priority tags (<P1>, <P2>), matching a Phase 4a scenario-drafting deliverable rather than earlier-phase research/synthesis.
